metadata.title: ELBTRONIKA – Immersive Art Gallery
metadata.description: Discover contemporary art and electronic music in an immersive 3D gallery.

immersive.noAudio: Audio is recommended for the full experience.

gallery.title: 3D Gallery
gallery.description: Experience ELBTRONIKA art in an immersive 3D space.
gallery.noScript: The 3D gallery requires JavaScript. Please enable JavaScript in your browser.

checkout.title: Checkout

press.metaDescription: Press information, vision, and media resources for ELBTRONIKA.
press.heroSubtitle: The story behind the intersection of electronic music and contemporary art.
press.visionText: ELBTRONIKA is a curated platform where electronic music and visionary digital art collide. We believe art should not just be seen — it should be felt, with all senses, in immersive spaces, accompanied by sound.
press.roadmapFoundation: Foundation: Auth, CMS, 3D Engine, Spatial Audio
press.roadmapCommerce: Commerce: Stripe Connect, Checkout, Artist Dashboard
press.roadmapAi: AI: Hermes Agent, Curation, Matching Engine
press.teamLouBio: Solo-builder with a background in medical technology. Building ELBTRONIKA from zero to market — with a focus on engineering excellence, fair revenue splits, and privacy by architecture.
press.contactText: For interview requests, image material, and press kit:

pitch.metaDescription: Exclusive investor dashboard with metrics, pipeline, and audit log.
